attempt.attempt: Apply the TICKET74 correction: a bounded frontier that appears extinct under one predicate may leak into uncovered states, so coverage and successor closure must be proven before a finite result is promoted.

bounded_result.candidate_theorem: Every even target outside the certified range is covered by a uniform positive representation lower bound, or an escaping exceptional packet is isolated.
bounded_result.counterexample_target: an exact exceptional even sequence that evades every claimed representation cover

attempt.obstruction: This transfer is a proof obligation, not evidence that the target conjecture is solved.
attempt.candidate_theorem: Every even target outside the certified range is covered by a uniform positive representation lower bound, or an escaping exceptional packet is isolated.
attempt.next_experiment: Prove a problem-specific global frontier cover before interpreting bounded extinction as a theorem.
attempt.claim_boundary: No goldbach proof and no certified goldbach counterexample.

claim_boundary: No goldbach proof and no certified goldbach counterexample.
